title: Conflict Management & Resolution In The Workplace
subtitle: A 1-day HRD Corp-claimable workplace effectiveness workshop for strengthening conflict management & resolution in the workplace.
whyThisMatters: Conflict Management & Resolution In The Workplace helps employees and supervisors strengthen conflict management & resolution in the workplace through clearer communication, practical tools, and better everyday work habits. Participants explore conflict management and resolution, to our communication with others, and Understand and employ the communication process effectively so the learning can be translated into immediate action at work.
builtFor: Employees who need stronger communication or personal effectiveness habits
walkAwayWith: Communicate and organize work with more clarity and confidence.
Apply practical tools to improve decisions, writing, planning, or collaboration.
Recognize habits that affect personal and team performance.
Build action steps for better day-to-day effectiveness.

modules.title: Understand and employ the communication process effectively

methodologyCaption: The workshop combines short inputs, practical exercises, and reflection so participants can translate the topic into everyday work habits.
sourceDoc: course/documents-markdown/Conflict Management & Resolution In The Workplace.md
